references.hebrew: מִ֥מְתִֽים־יָדְךָ֨ ׀ יְהֹוָ֡ה מִֽמְתִ֬ים מֵחֶ֗לֶד חֶלְקָ֥ם בַּֽחַיִּים֮ (וצפינך) [וּֽצְפוּנְךָ֮] תְּמַלֵּ֢א בִ֫טְנָ֥ם יִשְׂבְּע֥וּ בָנִ֑ים וְהִנִּ֥יחוּ יִ֝תְרָ֗ם לְעוֹלְלֵיהֶֽם׃
references.english:
from mortals, O ETERNAL One, with Your hand,
from mortals whose share in life is fleeting.
But as to Your treasured ones,
fill their bellies.gfrom mortals, O ETERNAL ONE, … fill their bellies Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
Their children too shall be satisfied,
and have something to leave over for their young.

references.hebrew: כִּי־עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְי֣וֹן אָנֹ֑כִי וְ֝לִבִּ֗י חָלַ֥ל בְּקִרְבִּֽי׃
references.english:
For I am poor and needy,
and my heart is pierced within me.

references.hebrew: לְאַֽהֲבָה֙ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ לִשְׁמֹ֥עַ בְּקֹל֖וֹ וּלְדׇבְקָה־ב֑וֹ כִּ֣י ה֤וּא חַיֶּ֙יךָ֙ וְאֹ֣רֶךְ יָמֶ֔יךָ לָשֶׁ֣בֶת עַל־הָאֲדָמָ֗ה אֲשֶׁר֩ נִשְׁבַּ֨ע יְהֹוָ֧ה לַאֲבֹתֶ֛יךָ לְאַבְרָהָ֛ם לְיִצְחָ֥ק וּֽלְיַעֲקֹ֖ב לָתֵ֥ת לָהֶֽם׃ {פ}
references.english: by loving the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God, by heeding God’s commands, and by holding fast to [God]. For thereby you shall have life and shall long endure upon the soil that G<small>OD</small> swore to your fathers Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, to give to them.

commentary_links.hebrew: נְאֻֽם־פֶּ֣שַׁע לָ֭רָשָׁע בְּקֶ֣רֶב לִבִּ֑י אֵֽין־פַּ֥חַד אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָֽיו׃
commentary_links.english:
I knowaI know Lit. “In my heart is.” what Transgression says to the wicked;
they have no sense of the dread of God,
commentary_links.matched_snippet: לרשע בק רב לבי אין פחד אלהים לנגד

commentary_links.hebrew: כִּֽי־יַ֭עֲמֹד לִימִ֣ין אֶבְי֑וֹן לְ֝הוֹשִׁ֗יעַ מִשֹּׁפְטֵ֥י נַפְשֽׁוֹ׃ {פ}
commentary_links.english:
because [God] stands at the right hand of the needy,
to save them from those who would condemn them.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: לימין אביון להושיע משפטי נפשו &star אמר

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאָ֣הַבְתָּ֔ אֵ֖ת יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֑יךָ בְּכׇל־לְבָבְךָ֥ וּבְכׇל־נַפְשְׁךָ֖ וּבְכׇל־מְאֹדֶֽךָ׃
commentary_links.english: You shall love the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your might.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: חנינא בן דוסא העולם הבא &star ואהבת את
